languages.text: Эоганн раскрыл истину про Нунциуса, и теперь Вольному Торговцу предстоит найти путь к таинственной планете Амсанкт, чтобы помочь техножрецу решить судьбу дражайшего коллеги.
Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.
languages.original_text: Эоганн раскрыл истину про Нунциуса, и теперь Вольному Торговцу предстоит найти путь к таинственной планете Амсанкт, чтобы помочь техножрецу решить судьбу дражайшего коллеги.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.
Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.
Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.

languages.text: Nachdem Eogunn die Wahrheit über Nuncius offenbart hat, muss {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} einen Weg auf den mysteriösen Planeten Amsanct finden, um dem Techpriester zu helfen, das Schicksal seines geschätzten Kollegen zu bestimmen.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.

traits.locale_text: Nachdem Eogunn die Wahrheit über Nuncius offenbart hat, muss {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} einen Weg auf den mysteriösen Planeten Amsanct finden, um dem Techpriester zu helfen, das Schicksal seines geschätzten Kollegen zu bestimmen.

languages.text: Eogunn a révélé la vérité à propos de Nuncius. À présent, {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} doit trouver un moyen de se rendre sur Amsanct afin d'aider le technoprêtre à décider du sort de son très cher collègue.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn a révélé la vérité à propos de Nuncius. À présent, {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} doit trouver un moyen de se rendre sur Amsanct afin d'aider le technoprêtre à décider du sort de son très cher collègue.

languages.text: 伊奥贡已经道出了努恩修斯的真相，如今行商浪人必须设法前往神秘的阿姆桑克特行星，帮助这位技术神甫决定他那位尊敬的同僚的命运。
languages.original_text: Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡已经道出了努恩修斯的真相，如今行商浪人必须设法前往神秘的阿姆桑克特行星，帮助这位技术神甫决定他那位尊敬的同僚的命运。

languages.text: Eogunn ha revelado la verdad sobre Nuncius y ahora {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente debe encontrar la forma de llegar al misterioso planeta Amsanct para ayudar al tecnosacerdote a decidir el destino de su estimado colega.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn ha revelado la verdad sobre Nuncius y ahora {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente debe encontrar la forma de llegar al misterioso planeta Amsanct para ayudar al tecnosacerdote a decidir el destino de su estimado colega.

languages.text: エオグンはヌンシウスに関する真実を明らかにした。そして今、ローグ・トレーダーは、尊敬する同僚の運命を決めるテック・プリーストを助けるために、謎の惑星アムサンクトへの道を見つけなければならない。
languages.original_text: Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.

languages.text: Eogunn, Nuncius hakkındaki gerçeği ortaya çıkardı. Şimdi Hür Tacir, Tekno Rahip'in saygıdeğer meslektaşının kaderini belirlemesine yardım etmek için gizemli Amsanct gezegenine gitmenin bir yolunu bulmalı.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, Nuncius hakkındaki gerçeği ortaya çıkardı. Şimdi Hür Tacir, Tekno Rahip'in saygıdeğer meslektaşının kaderini belirlemesine yardım etmek için gizemli Amsanct gezegenine gitmenin bir yolunu bulmalı.
